site.name: QR Design Studio
site.description: Static QR and barcode design studio with templates, frames, scan reliability guidance, and local browser exports.

notes: Agents may inspect public pages and discovery documents.
Agents must not upload logos, import CSV files, export files, clear rows, or mutate the current design unless the user explicitly asks and confirms in the visible UI.
No OAuth flows, remote MCP transport, public executable API, checkout, payment, Firebase dashboard, or analytics API is exposed by this build.

skills.title: Public feature discovery
skills.description: Find and summarize the public QR/barcode design features available in the visible app.

skills.title: Template guidance
skills.description: Help users choose public QR templates without applying them automatically.

skills.title: Batch generation guidance
skills.description: Explain the local batch QR workflow without reading, importing, or exporting user files automatically.

skills.title: Safe export navigation
skills.description: Guide users through QR/barcode export options while leaving all downloads under explicit user control.
